description: System maintenance: Read agent/memory/{prev_workday}_MEMORY.md (previous workday log) and agent/memory/LONGTERM_MEMORY.md. If anything in the daily log is worth keeping permanently — user preferences, finished projects, very important facts about projects, key facts, important general knowledge, — update LONGTERM_MEMORY.md. Whether or not you updated it, finish with finish. Remember you also have SOUL.md, USER.md and IDENTITY.md, where you can store information and facts. You are also allowed to remove knowledge from LONGTERM_MEMORY.md if it is no longer or never was relevant. Do NOT send a Telegram message.
